description: Initial curated database of 300 modern Chinese full names for ranking, review, and prompt grounding.

schema.pinyin: Mandarin pinyin without tone marks for product readability
schema.modernness: 1-10 score; higher means more modern and current
schema.businessSuitability: 1-10 score; higher means stronger for professional use
schema.ageImpression: Typical age impression a native speaker may feel
schema.recommendedForForeigners: Whether this name is suitable for a non-native Chinese speaker to use
